steps.t: Fróthi can be found in Erebor. You should talk to Fróthi in Erebor.
Léothred can be found in Erebor. You should talk to Léothred in Erebor.
Fróthi can be found in Skarháld. You should talk to Fróthi in Skarháld.
Fróthi can be found in Skarháld. You should talk to Fróthi in Skarháld.
Supplies can be found throughout Skarháld. You should gather supplies for Fróthi and Léothred.
Léothred can be found in Skarháld. You should bring the supplies to Léothred in Skarháld.
